top_signals.title: Discord migrates all users to end-to-end encryption by default
top_signals.summary: The move comes as other major social media platforms are killing end-to-end encryption for messaging. In recent months, Instagram and TikTok both announced they will no longer offer the feature.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: DNK Launches Program for Assured Positioning, Navigation and Timing Services
top_signals.summary: Den Norske Krigsforsikring for Skib (DNK) has launched a program to provide members access to Assured Positioning, Navigation and Timing (A-PNT) services to counter the growing risk of jamming and spoofing.DNK, Norway’s leading war risk mutual insurance provider…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: cruisePAL to Provide Safety Management System Modules to Mercy Ships
top_signals.summary: cruisePAL has announced a strategic partnership with Mercy Ships, the international non-governmental organization dedicated to delivering free, lifechanging surgical care and medical training worldwide.cruisePAL will provide its comprehensive…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
